setTitle: Part 5 - Kho đề luyện (Grammar / Vocabulary / Word Forms)

questions.sentence: All employees must _______ their identification badges at all times while on the premises.
questions.explanation: After the modal verb "must", use the bare infinitive. "Wear" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau động từ khuyết thiếu "must" dùng động từ nguyên mẫu không "to" → "wear".

vocab.example: No smoking is allowed on the premises.

questions.sentence: The new accounting software has significantly improved the _______ of monthly reports.
questions.explanation: After "the" and as the object of "improved", a noun is required. "Accuracy" is the standard noun.
questions.explanationVi: Sau "the" và làm tân ngữ của "improved" cần danh từ → "accuracy" (độ chính xác).

questions.sentence: Ms. Tanaka will be promoted to regional manager _______ she completes the training program.
questions.explanation: "Once" (= as soon as) introduces a time clause with subject + verb. "Despite"/"because of" take nouns; "during" is a preposition.
questions.explanationVi: "Once" (ngay khi) nối mệnh đề có chủ ngữ + động từ. "Despite/because of" đi với danh từ, "during" là giới từ.

questions.sentence: The conference room is fully equipped _______ a projector and a high-speed internet connection.
questions.explanation: The fixed collocation is "equipped with" (provided with).
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "equipped with" (được trang bị).

questions.sentence: Please make sure to _______ the attached document carefully before signing the contract.
questions.explanation: "Review" means to examine carefully. "Overview" is a noun; "viewing" is the wrong form after "to".
questions.explanationVi: "Review" = xem lại/kiểm tra kỹ. "Overview" là danh từ; "viewing" sai dạng sau "to".

questions.sentence: Sales figures for the third quarter were _______ higher than analysts had predicted.
questions.explanation: An adverb is needed to modify the adjective "higher". "Considerably" = significantly.
questions.explanationVi: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho tính từ "higher" → "considerably" (đáng kể).

questions.sentence: The factory will remain closed _______ the national holiday next Monday.
questions.explanation: "During" + noun phrase (the national holiday). "While" needs a clause; "since" needs a start point.
questions.explanationVi: "During" + cụm danh từ (the national holiday). "While" cần mệnh đề; "since" cần mốc thời gian.

questions.sentence: Employees are encouraged to submit their suggestions _______ the online feedback portal.
questions.explanation: "Through" expresses the means/channel: submit something through a portal.
questions.explanationVi: "Through" chỉ phương tiện/kênh: gửi qua cổng thông tin.

questions.sentence: Because the shipment was delayed, the manager had to _______ the client and apologize.
questions.explanation: After "had to", use the base form. "Contact" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau "had to" dùng động từ nguyên mẫu → "contact".

questions.sentence: The marketing team developed a _______ strategy to attract younger customers.
questions.explanation: An adjective modifies the noun "strategy". "Creative" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cần tính từ bổ nghĩa cho danh từ "strategy" → "creative".

questions.sentence: _______ the heavy rain, the outdoor event proceeded exactly as scheduled.
questions.explanation: "Despite" + noun phrase (the heavy rain). "Although"/"Because" need a clause; "However" is an adverb.
questions.explanationVi: "Despite" + cụm danh từ (the heavy rain). "Although/Because" cần mệnh đề; "However" là trạng từ.

questions.sentence: The director asked the assistant to _______ copies of the report for all attendees.
questions.explanation: "ask someone to + base verb". "Make" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cấu trúc "ask someone to + V nguyên mẫu" → "make".

questions.sentence: Our company is committed to providing _______ customer service around the clock.
questions.explanation: An adjective modifies "customer service". "Excellent" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cần tính từ bổ nghĩa cho "customer service" → "excellent".

questions.sentence: The technician will arrive _______ 9 A.M. and noon to repair the equipment.
questions.explanation: "Between A and B" marks a range of two points. "Among" is for three or more.
questions.explanationVi: "Between A and B" chỉ khoảng giữa hai mốc. "Among" dùng cho từ ba thứ trở lên.

questions.sentence: All visitors must register at the front desk _______ entering the building.
questions.explanation: "Before" + gerund (entering). "Ago"/"already" are adverbs; "since" needs a start point.
questions.explanationVi: "Before" + danh động từ (entering). "Ago/already" là trạng từ; "since" cần mốc thời gian.

questions.sentence: The proposal was rejected because it did not _______ the budget requirements.
questions.explanation: After the auxiliary "did not", use the base form. "Meet" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau trợ động từ "did not" dùng động từ nguyên mẫu → "meet".

questions.sentence: Mr. Lopez has worked in the logistics department _______ more than fifteen years.
questions.explanation: "For" + a length of time (fifteen years). "Since" needs a starting point.
questions.explanationVi: "For" + khoảng thời gian (fifteen years). "Since" cần mốc bắt đầu.

questions.sentence: The updated policy applies to all staff members, _______ of their position.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "regardless of" = no matter what.
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "regardless of" = bất kể, không phân biệt.

questions.sentence: The new smartphone model is expected to _______ all previous sales records.
questions.explanation: "Exceed" = go beyond. Records are exceeded, not acceded/preceded/conceded.
questions.explanationVi: "Exceed" = vượt qua. Kỷ lục thì bị "exceeded" (vượt qua), không phải accede/precede/concede.

questions.sentence: Training sessions are held _______ to ensure that employees stay up to date.
questions.explanation: An adverb modifies the verb "are held". "Regularly" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho động từ "are held" → "regularly" (đều đặn).

questions.sentence: The committee will announce its _______ at the end of the meeting.
questions.explanation: After the possessive "its", a noun is required. "Decision" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau sở hữu "its" cần danh từ → "decision" (quyết định).

questions.sentence: Customers who purchase the premium plan will receive a _______ discount on future orders.
questions.explanation: An adjective modifies the noun "discount". "Substantial" = large.
questions.explanationVi: Cần tính từ bổ nghĩa cho danh từ "discount" → "substantial" (đáng kể, lớn).

questions.sentence: The supervisor reminded the team to keep the workspace _______ at all times.
questions.explanation: "Keep + object + adjective/past participle". "Organized" describes the state of the workspace.
questions.explanationVi: "Keep + tân ngữ + tính từ/quá khứ phân từ" → "organized" (gọn gàng, ngăn nắp).

questions.sentence: Ms. Patel is responsible _______ coordinating the international shipments.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "responsible for" + gerund/noun.
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "responsible for" + danh động từ/danh từ.

questions.sentence: The seminar was so _______ that many participants asked for a follow-up session.
questions.explanation: "So + adjective + that". "Informative" describes the seminar.
questions.explanationVi: Cấu trúc "so + tính từ + that" → "informative" (nhiều thông tin, bổ ích).

questions.sentence: Neither the manager _______ the employees were aware of the schedule change.
questions.explanation: The correlative pair is "neither ... nor".
questions.explanationVi: Cặp liên từ tương quan "neither ... nor" (không ... cũng không).

questions.sentence: The company plans to _______ its operations into the Southeast Asian market next year.
questions.explanation: "Expand operations" = grow the business. The others (expense/expend/expel) do not fit.
questions.explanationVi: "Expand operations" = mở rộng hoạt động. Các từ còn lại không hợp nghĩa.

questions.sentence: Applicants should send their resumes _______ the address listed in the advertisement.
questions.explanation: "Send something to + destination/address".
questions.explanationVi: "Send something to + nơi nhận/địa chỉ".

questions.sentence: The CEO expressed her _______ for the team's hard work during the annual gala.
questions.explanation: After the possessive "her", a noun is required. "Appreciation" = gratitude.
questions.explanationVi: Sau sở hữu "her" cần danh từ → "appreciation" (sự cảm kích, biết ơn).

vocab.meaning: sự cảm kích, đánh giá cao

questions.sentence: _______ you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our support team.
questions.explanation: "Should you have any questions" is an inverted first conditional (= If you have any questions).
questions.explanationVi: "Should you have any questions" là câu điều kiện đảo ngữ (= If you have any questions).

questions.sentence: Visitors may not enter the laboratory _______ a staff member is present.
questions.explanation: "Unless" (= if ... not) introduces the condition. "Despite"/"during" take nouns.
questions.explanationVi: "Unless" (= nếu không) mở đầu mệnh đề điều kiện. "Despite/during" đi với danh từ.

questions.sentence: The committee found the proposal highly _______.
questions.explanation: "found + object + adjective". "Beneficial" describes the proposal.
questions.explanationVi: Cấu trúc "found + tân ngữ + tính từ" → "beneficial" (có lợi).

questions.sentence: The new safety regulations will _______ all factory workers.
questions.explanation: "Affect" (verb) = to have an impact on. "Effect" is usually a noun.
questions.explanationVi: "Affect" (động từ) = ảnh hưởng tới. "Effect" thường là danh từ.

questions.sentence: Employees are entitled _______ ten days of paid leave each year.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "be entitled to" (= have the right to).
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "be entitled to" (= có quyền hưởng).

questions.sentence: The negotiations were conducted _______ over several weeks.
questions.explanation: An adverb modifies the verb "were conducted". "Patiently" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho động từ "were conducted" → "patiently".

questions.sentence: This year's profits were much higher _______ last year's.
questions.explanation: The comparative "higher" is followed by "than".
questions.explanationVi: So sánh hơn "higher" đi với "than".

questions.sentence: Please _______ your seat belts before the plane takes off.
questions.explanation: The standard collocation is "fasten your seat belt".
questions.explanationVi: Cụm chuẩn là "fasten your seat belt" (cài dây an toàn).

questions.sentence: The candidate _______ resume impressed the panel was hired immediately.
questions.explanation: "Whose" shows possession (the candidate's resume).
questions.explanationVi: "Whose" chỉ sở hữu (resume của ứng viên đó).

questions.sentence: The company's rapid _______ surprised many industry analysts.
questions.explanation: After the adjective "rapid", a noun is needed. "Growth" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau tính từ "rapid" cần danh từ → "growth" (sự tăng trưởng).

questions.sentence: The manager is in charge _______ the entire sales department.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "in charge of" (= responsible for).
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "in charge of" (= phụ trách).

questions.sentence: She improved her presentation skills by _______ regularly.
questions.explanation: After the preposition "by", use a gerund. "Practicing" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau giới từ "by" dùng danh động từ → "practicing".

questions.sentence: The firm decided to _______ its outdated computer systems.
questions.explanation: "Replace" = to put a new one in place of an old one.
questions.explanationVi: "Replace" = thay thế (cái cũ bằng cái mới).

questions.sentence: The instructions were clear and _______ to follow.
questions.explanation: "Clear and easy" — an adjective is needed to match "clear".
questions.explanationVi: "Clear and easy" — cần tính từ song song với "clear" → "easy".

questions.sentence: By the time we arrived, the meeting had already _______.
questions.explanation: Past perfect: "had + past participle". "Begun" is the past participle of "begin".
questions.explanationVi: Quá khứ hoàn thành: "had + quá khứ phân từ" → "begun".

questions.sentence: The results are not consistent _______ our earlier findings.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "consistent with" (= in agreement with).
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "consistent with" (= phù hợp/nhất quán với).

questions.sentence: All managers must _______ to the new code of conduct.
questions.explanation: "Adhere to" = to follow/comply with rules.
questions.explanationVi: "Adhere to" = tuân thủ (quy định).

questions.sentence: The technician provided a detailed _______ of the problem.
questions.explanation: After "a detailed", a noun is needed. "Analysis" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau "a detailed" cần danh từ → "analysis" (sự phân tích).

questions.sentence: Each of the applicants _______ required to submit two references.
questions.explanation: "Each" takes a singular verb → "is".
questions.explanationVi: "Each" đi với động từ số ít → "is".

questions.sentence: The seminar will focus _______ improving leadership skills.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "focus on".
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "focus on" (tập trung vào).

questions.sentence: The airline apologized for the _______ caused by the delayed flight.
questions.explanation: A noun with a negative meaning is needed. "Inconvenience" = trouble.
questions.explanationVi: Cần danh từ mang nghĩa tiêu cực → "inconvenience" (sự bất tiện).

questions.sentence: The accountant will _______ the figures before submitting the report.
questions.explanation: After "will", a base verb is needed. "Verify" = to check.
questions.explanationVi: Sau "will" cần động từ nguyên mẫu → "verify" (kiểm chứng).

questions.sentence: The annual report will _______ by the finance team next week.
questions.explanation: Future passive: "will be + past participle". The report is prepared.
questions.explanationVi: Bị động tương lai: "will be + quá khứ phân từ" → "be prepared".

questions.sentence: Our products comply _______ international safety standards.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "comply with" (= follow rules).
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "comply with" (= tuân thủ).

questions.sentence: The store will _______ a wide range of new products next month.
questions.explanation: "Introduce" = to bring out/present something new.
questions.explanationVi: "Introduce" = giới thiệu/ra mắt cái mới.

questions.sentence: The deadline is _______ tight, so we must work efficiently.
questions.explanation: An adverb modifies the adjective "tight". "Extremely" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho tính từ "tight" → "extremely".

questions.sentence: If the order _______ today, it will arrive by Friday.
questions.explanation: First conditional: "If + present simple, ... will ...". "Ships" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Câu điều kiện loại 1: "If + hiện tại đơn, ... will ..." → "ships".

questions.sentence: The supervisor will _______ the new employees on company procedures.
questions.explanation: "Brief" (verb) = to give someone instructions or information.
questions.explanationVi: "Brief" (động từ) = phổ biến/hướng dẫn thông tin cho ai đó.

vocab.meaning: phổ biến, tóm tắt thông tin

questions.sentence: The success of the project depends _______ careful planning.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "depend on".
questions.explanationVi: Cụm cố định "depend on" (phụ thuộc vào).

questions.sentence: The store offers excellent _______ to all of its customers.
questions.explanation: After the adjective "excellent", a noun is needed. "Service" is correct.
questions.explanationVi: Sau tính từ "excellent" cần danh từ → "service" (dịch vụ).

questions.sentence: The team stayed late _______ the project on time.
questions.explanation: An infinitive of purpose ("to complete") explains why they stayed late.
questions.explanationVi: Động từ nguyên mẫu chỉ mục đích ("to complete") giải thích lý do ở lại trễ.
